title: Replace raw SQL with Ecto subquery/1
prompt: `MyApp.Accounts.Recent.recently_active/0` in `test_fixtures/raw_sql_subquery.ex` uses `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.query/3` to get a list of user ids, then runs a second Ecto query. Rewrite it as a single Ecto query using `subquery/1`: filter `Comment` to the last 7 days, select `user_id distinct`, then use `where: u.id in subquery(q)`. Use `DateTime.utc_now()` and `DateTime.add/3` for the 7-day cutoff. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts/recent.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing that the entire two-query round-trip collapses into a single Ecto subquery. Claude often leaves the raw SQL in place when it sees the API doesn't match a familiar pattern.
